task_completion.description: Configure Stellarium location to Chimney Rock Great House.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Stellarium location window or bottom status bar displays 'Chimney Rock Great House' or coordinates approximately 37.193° N, 107.309° W, and an altitude of 2300m.

task_completion.description: Configure Stellarium date and time to December 15, 2024, at 23:50:00 UTC.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Stellarium date/time window or bottom status bar shows the date as 2024-12-15 and the time as 23:50:00. The timezone should be set to UTC.

task_completion.description: Center the Moon in the view while it is rising in the northeast.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Stellarium view shows the Moon in the center of the screen. The cardinal point 'NE' (Northeast) or an azimuthal grid should be visible, confirming the Moon is rising in the northeast.

task_completion.description: Capture a screenshot of the Stellarium view to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot tool, terminal command, or file manager shows an image file being saved to or present in the `/home/ga/Pictures/stellarium/` directory.

task_completion.description: Write an educational brief containing the location, date, and measured azimuth.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal shows the creation or content of `/home/ga/Desktop/standstill_brief.txt`. The text must include the location ('Chimney Rock'), the date ('December 15, 2024' or '2024-12-15'), and an azimuth value.

integrity.description: The agent used the Stellarium GUI to simulate the event.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Stellarium application open and being interacted with, rather than just terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent measured the azimuth from Stellarium rather than guessing or using external knowledge.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent clicks on the Moon in Stellarium to view its information (which includes azimuth) or visually estimates it from the azimuthal grid before writing the brief.

integrity.description: The brief is saved to the exact requested path.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor or terminal command explicitly targets `/home/ga/Desktop/standstill_brief.txt`.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring Stellarium to Chimney Rock Great House (37.193° N, 107.309° W, 2300 m) on 2024-12-15 at 23:50:00 UTC. The Moon must be centered in the view, rising in the northeast. A screenshot must be saved to /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium/. An educational brief must be written to /home/ga/Desktop/standstill_brief.txt containing the location (Chimney Rock), date, and measured azimuth. The verifier script strictly checks for precise display flags (atmosphere off, landscape on, azimuthal grid on, cardinal points on), so these should ideally be visible in the Stellarium view.
